themes.label: Guidance
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes leading, direction, teaching, or the path God sets before His people. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And Hoshea the son of Elah made a conspiracy against Pekah the son of Remaliah, and smote him...". Word-study detail reinforces "וַיִּמְלֹ֖ךְ: him and reigned - to reign; hence (by implication) to take counsel".
